hooks.command: jq -c 'if .tool_input.subagent_type == "cara-dune" then {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", additionalContext: "WATCH LIST when reviewing cara-dune output: (1) Did it write anything under .claude/agent-memory/cara-dune/? If not, `memory: project` is not auto-injecting — add a short memory pointer back to the agent body (not the full preamble). (2) Did it run `uv run --extra dev pytest`? If it fell back to bare `pytest`, tighten rule 5 in .claude/agents/cara-dune.md to make CLAUDE.md read mandatory. (3) Did its output include the `OVERALL COVERAGE: <int>%` line on its own line? ig-11 parses this exactly."}} else empty end'
